pr.title: Record: FarnsworthEngine v1 — TTT + 11L Int6 MLP3x, val_bpb=1.1303

output.summary: Stacks test-time SGD on val data atop Int6 11L MLP3x with SmearGate, BigramHash, Muon+SWA, and NTK-RoPE ahead of sliding eval.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Performs full-weight SGD adaptation on validation data (TTT) before scoring.
techniques: 11-layer Int6 MLP3x with SmearGate and BigramHash
Muon optimizer with SWA plus NTK-RoPE positional encoding
Test-time SGD adaptation on val data before sliding-window eval
